/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/common/thc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/common/generalexception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/common/socketinstance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/common/PGNUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/tiny-process-library/process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/tiny-process-library/process_unix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Sprite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/UIGroup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Label.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/MovesPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/LevelPopup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/DepthPopup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/TimePopup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/PGNLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Connector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/TextField.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/FontManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/ControllerGUIjson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controller_gui.dir/src/Prefs.cpp.o  -o controller_gui -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lpthread -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf -lpthread
